rows.label: tev000491_MSG0001
rows.name: Is that you, [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0002
rows.name:
What brings you to this
neck of the woods?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0003
rows.name:
As you can see, I've been inspecting
the water- purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0004
rows.name:
Water is every bit as vital here
on Mira as it was back on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0005
rows.name:
Therefore, it must be
rigorously supervised![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev000491_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask H.B. if he is a Companion.

rows.label: tev000491_JNK0020
rows.name: Observe

rows.label: tev000491_SEL0021
rows.name: Point out that this is a job for BLADE HQ.

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0006
rows.name:
What idiocy is this? Have
you lost your wits?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0007
rows.name:
I am a Pathfinder through and through!
...And a quite famous one, I might add.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0008
rows.name:
You are not wrong—the
responsibility does lie with HQ.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0009
rows.name:
"But wait!" I hear you cry. "Why
is a Pathfinder of H.B.'s stature
doing their job for them?"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0010
rows.name:
There are but two possibilities—because they are
incapable of doing it themselves, or because my
capabilities make me especially qualified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0011
rows.name: The answer is, of course, the latter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0012
rows.name:
Anyway, HQ is known to be
shorthanded at the moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0013
rows.name:
When capable citizens step up
to assist with their workload,
it benefits all of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0014
rows.name:
Is hammering in data probes a
Pathfinder'ss only duty to NLA? No!
The very notion reeks of indolence![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0015
rows.name:
If ever a citizen of NLA finds his
talents needed, he must answer the
call, whenever and wherever it comes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0016
rows.name:
When fellow citizens are in peril,
do you not rush to their aid?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_JNK0030
rows.name: Concur

rows.label: tev000491_SEL0031
rows.name: Agree that H.B.'s assertion is logically sound.

rows.label: tev000491_JNK0040
rows.name: Object

rows.label: tev000491_SEL0041
rows.name: Accept H.B.'s reasoning, but express reservations.

rows.label: tev000491_JNK0050
rows.name: Rebut

rows.label: tev000491_SEL0051
rows.name: Refute H.B.'s assertion.

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0017
rows.name:
I pride myself on being an excellent judge of
character, and I see now how right I was about your
command of objective reason and holistic wisdom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0018
rows.name:
I am honored to have met someone capable
of understanding my philosophy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0019
rows.name: That is an all-too-common reaction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0020
rows.name:
Nevertheless, I applaud your grasp
of reason. If you cannot embrace the
truth, at least you can accept it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0021
rows.name:
Even your minimal level of
perspicacity is a breath of
fresh air by NLA standards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0022
rows.name: The nerve![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0023
rows.name:
Do calm down now. You're
embarrassing yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0024
rows.name:
Surely you didn't intend to pick a fight
when you initiated this conversation?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0025
rows.name:
Please remember why you came here
in the first place. Oh, and do try
to maintain your composure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well, that concludes my
inspection of this facility.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0027
rows.name:
I have some important business to
attend to in the industrial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000491_MSG0028
rows.name: I hope we can work together again soon.[ST:wait ]
